privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic benchmark task for OpenSIS (a school information system). The task requires creating a Portal Note titled 'Spring Science Fair' with body text stating 'Registration for the annual Science Fair is now open. Please pick up forms from the main office by Friday.' The note must be visible to Students and Parents only, with Teachers and Admins explicitly excluded from access. All metadata values match the task description requirements.
